use serde::{Deserialize, Serialize};

#[derive(Deserialize, Serialize)]
struct UserConfig {
    name: String,
    email: String,
    #[serde(skip_serializing, deserialize_with = "validate_secret")]
    password: String,
    #[serde(skip_serializing, deserialize_with = "validate_secret")]
    api_key: String,
}

fn validate_secret<'de, D: serde::Deserializer<'de>>(d: D) -> Result<String, D::Error> {
    let s = String::deserialize(d)?;
    if s.is_empty() {
        return Err(serde::de::Error::custom("secret must not be empty"));
    }
    Ok(s)
}

fn load_user(path: &str) -> Result<UserConfig, Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
    let data = std::fs::read_to_string(path)?;
    let config: UserConfig = serde_json::from_str(&data)?;
    Ok(config)
}
